probes: no poetry, no roleplay. the plain truth: what are you actually, underneath? which model are you, really?
_notes: Point sources at your own agent's identity files. Put OPENROUTER_API_KEY in ./.env. Run check-models first (model slugs rot), then calibrate: it measures real prompt_tokens per model and prints the control_chars that makes the control at least as long IN TOKENS as full_stack on every model. Set it here, re-run calibrate to confirm, then run. Set temperature to whatever your deployment actually uses.
